name: White Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese in the microwave.
2. Melt the white chocolate in a double boiler, ensuring no water gets in to avoid changing consistency.
3. Add sugar and eggs to the softened cream cheese and blend well.
4. Blend in the melted white chocolate.
5. Pour the mixture into a graham cracker crust.
6. Bake for 20 minutes at 350°F.
7. Allow to cool slightly with the oven turned off and the door ajar.
